name: Circle POP
description: The Circle POP creates a number of points in a circle, ellipse or arc, and optionally connects them as a line strip, a set of triangles, separate 2-point lines, or unconnected as point primitives. You can choose to not Close the circle, where the last point/section is not connected to first. You can add texture coordinate, normal or tangent attributes to the points or to the vertices. Of note are normals, which can optionally point radially away from the center, or tangent to the circle. Orientation can be in any of the XY, YZ or ZX planes and then further rotated and translated.m If a POP is connected to the input, it will translate / scale the circle to the bounding box of the input. If a POP is connected to the input and if Modify Bounds is set, it will scale / translate the circle to the bounding box of the input, and you can further translate/scale/rotate the circle. See also [[Rectangle POP]], [[Sphere POP]], [[Primitive POP]], [[Line POP]].

parameters.name: Connectivity
parameters.label: Connectivity
parameters.description: Determines whether and how to connect the points.

parameters.name: Modify Bounds
parameters.label: Modify Bounds
parameters.description: Available only when an input is connected to the POP to set bounds for the POP. When Modify Bounds is On the parameters below will further modify the shape of the POP.

parameters.name: Divisions
parameters.label: Divisions
parameters.description: The number of divisions of the circle or arc.

parameters.name: Closed
parameters.label: Closed
parameters.description: The last vertex is connected to the first vertex.

parameters.name: Arc Angles
parameters.label: Arc Angles
parameters.description: The start and end angles of an arc.

parameters.name: Anchor U
parameters.label: Anchor U
parameters.description: Puts the left side, the middle or the right side at the origin 0.

parameters.name: Anchor V
parameters.label: Anchor V
parameters.description: Puts the bottom side, the middle or the top side at the origin 0.

parameters.name: Translate
parameters.label: Translate
parameters.description: Translate the points in the three axes.

parameters.name: Rotate
parameters.label: Rotate
parameters.description: Rotate the points around the corresponding X, Y and Z axes. Angles are given in degrees.

parameters.name: Uniform Scale
parameters.label: Uniform Scale
parameters.description: Specifies a uniform scale factor in all axes.

parameters.name: Normal
parameters.label: Normal
parameters.description: Choose whether to create a normal attribute and the attribute class of the normal attribute.

parameters.name: Tangent Direction
parameters.label: Tangent Direction
parameters.description: How to calculate the tangent for each point.

parameters.name: Texture Coordinates
parameters.label: Texture Coordinates
parameters.description: Sets the attribute class where the texture coordinates should be created.

_provenance.fact: parameters and description scraped from the live Circle_POP wiki page ({{Parameter}}/{{ParameterItem}} templates)
